creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Your patch has CRLF line endings and only applied with some manual work.

For future submissions, ideally prepare patches using git-format-patch(1) from a recent checkout of the FreeBSD ports tree.  If you can't do that, at least make sure that the patch is based on the root of the ports tree and has not been mangled by any system that processed it.

Will commit with my next batch.
